zh.Warkworth, Alnwick, Northumberland, Engl: 英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯
zh.Castle Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可卡素 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeliza de Vere於1125年出生在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆時，她的父親Aubrey II de Vere61歲，母親Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare31歲。她和Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1185年之後在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯。

zh-hans.Warkworth, Alnwick, Northumberland, Engl: 英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯
zh-hans.Castle Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国艾可卡素 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeliza de Vere于1125年出生在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆时，她的父亲Aubrey II de Vere61岁，母亲Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare31岁。她和Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1185年之后在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeliza de Vere was born in 1125, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, her father, Aubrey II de Vere, was 61 and her mother, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, was 31. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth. She died after 1185, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeliza de Vere est née en 1125, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Aubrey II de Vere, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth. Elle est décédée après 1185, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeliza de Vere 1125 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubrey II de Vere 61 und ihre Mutter Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare 31. Sie hatte mit Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1185 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza de Vere è nata il nel 1125 nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, sua padre, Aubrey II de Vere, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth. Morì dopo il 1185, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England.

ja.Warkworth, Alnwick, Northumberland, Engl: イギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルス
ja.St Osyth, Essex, England: イギリスエセックススト オシス
ja.Raby, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムラビー
ja.Castle Hedingham, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガム
ja.Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza de Vereが1125年にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Aubrey II de Vereは61歳，母Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clareは31歳であった。彼女はRoger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1185年以後にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza de Vere(이)가 1125년 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubrey II de Vere(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 이후 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza de Vere nasceu em 1125, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aubrey II de Vere, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth. Ela faleceu após 1185, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeliza de Vere родилась в 1125 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Aubrey II de Vere было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth. Она умерла после 1185 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeliza de Vere nació en 1125, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Aubrey II de Vere, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Roger FitzRichard , Lord of Warkworth. Murió después de 1185, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
